paper.title: AMD and OpenAI announce strategic partnership to deploy 6 gigawatts of AMD GPUs
paper.abstract: AMD and OpenAI have announced a multi-year partnership to deploy 6 gigawatts of AMD Instinct GPUs, beginning with 1 gigawatt in 2026, to power OpenAI’s next-generation AI infrastructure and accelerate global AI innovation.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
